title: Green Thumb
description: Allows players to plant and farm crops on any soil! (without tilling 👀)
body:
## 🌱 Green Thumb v1․0․0 🌱


**Grow crops on way more blocks!!** (no tilling required o.o)    
_No configuration necessary - add this to your world and you're good to go!_  


---


### Plant more crops on more blocks!


**Blocks ->** Grass Blocks (star of the show), Podzol, Mycelium, Dirt, Coarse Dirt, Rooted Dirt, Dirt Paths, Mud, Muddy Mangrove Roots, Moss Blocks, & Pale Moss Blocks (and still farmland)  

**Vanilla Crops ->** Wheat, Carrots, Potatoes, Beetroot, Melons, Pumpkins, Torchflowers, & Pitcher Crops  
("Crops" are considered to be any plant that would normally grow only on tilled soil!)

**Also makes netherwart able to be grown on soul soil**  
(because it should just be able to do that)


### Crops planted on the expanded block set...


- Will not get broken by players or mobs jumping on them (🥳)
- Still grow as though planted on farmland  
- Are still responsive to bonemeal
- **NEITHER REQUIRE NOR BENEFIT FROM NEARBY WATER**\* ⚠️   
  
<sup>\*farmland is (unfortunately) the only block with the "hydration" block state - this means  all added blocks are functionally identical to unhydrated farmland in terms of crop growth speed - crops will still grow most efficiently on hydrated farmland.<sup>

**so farming on hydrated farmland remains optimal, but farming elsewhere is still reasonable** - and the expanded placement capability opens up a lot more creative possibilities for players to play around with ✨  


------------------------------


### Contact

feel free to reach out with any issues/inquiries at: drecubed.contact@gmail.com  
*(especially on this one - I can very easily alter the block list for specific use cases - just shoot me an email 👍)*

*I plan to fork a version of this that will further expand plant "plantability" - i.e. allowing sugarcane to grow without water, allowing mushrooms to be placed without low light levels, etc., so keep an eye out for that! (and/or bug me to make it if/when I forget :P)*


-----------------------------
